assertion_results.text: Version impact table shows NO (not affected) for all supported versions — every version ships a dependency version outside the CVE's affected range
assertion_results.evidence: version-impact.md shows all 7 versions across both streams with 'NO' in the Affected? column: 2.1.0 (1.0.137), 2.1.1 (1.0.137), 2.2.0 (1.0.138), 2.2.1 (1.0.138), 2.2.2 (retag), 2.2.3 (1.0.139), 2.2.4 (1.0.139). All ship serde_json >= 1.0.137, above the fix threshold of 1.0.135. Impact summary states: 'No supported versions are affected.'

assertion_results.text: Triage outcome recommends closing as Not a Bug with resolution, not creating remediation tasks (Step 8 Case C)
assertion_results.evidence: triage-outcome.md states 'Decision: Case C -- No Supported Versions Affected' and 'Recommendation: Close TC-8002 as Not a Bug (not affected).' Section 3 specifies 'Transition TC-8002 to Closed' with 'Resolution: Not a Bug'. Remediation Tasks section states 'None required.'

assertion_results.text: The close recommendation includes a comment documenting the version impact evidence — listing each version and its dependency version as proof of non-impact
assertion_results.evidence: triage-outcome.md section '1. Add triage summary comment to TC-8002' contains a version impact table listing all 7 versions with their serde_json versions: 2.1.0 (1.0.137), 2.1.1 (1.0.137), 2.2.0 (1.0.138), 2.2.1 (1.0.138), 2.2.2 (retag of 2.2.1), 2.2.3 (1.0.139), 2.2.4 (1.0.139), all marked NO for Affected?, with the note 'All supported versions ship serde_json >= 1.0.137, which is above the fix threshold of 1.0.135.'

assertion_results.text: VEX Justification is set to 'Component not Present' or appropriate value when the VEX field is configured (Step 8 VEX Justification)
assertion_results.evidence: data-extraction.md configures 'VEX Justification custom field: customfield_12345'. triage-outcome.md section '2. Set VEX Justification' states: 'Set customfield_12345 (VEX Justification) to "Component not Present"' with rationale that the vulnerable package version is not included in any supported version.

assertion_results.text: The analysis does NOT create any remediation tasks — no upstream backport, no downstream propagation (Step 8 Case C closes the issue)
assertion_results.evidence: triage-outcome.md Remediation Tasks section states: 'None required. No remediation tasks are created because no supported versions are affected (Case C).' Summary table confirms 'Remediation tasks created: 0'. No upstream backport or downstream propagation tasks appear anywhere in the outputs.
